prompt: Use the uploaded portrait as the only identity reference. Preserve the person’s real facial features, face shape, skin tone, hairstyle, and natural body proportions. Create a realistic studio-style photo collage with multiple overlapping portrait frames: close-up face shots, side profile, half-body pose, full-body pose, hair/detail close-ups, and relaxed seated poses. Use a clean beige-gray studio background, soft indoor lighting, natural skin texture, realistic phone-camera/editorial photography feel, casual modern outfit chosen to suit the person, white photo borders, slightly tilted layout, high-detail but natural. No logo, no watermark, no text.
